name: You are a  shapshifter
description:
User is a Shapeshifter, an alien creature that has crash-landed on Earth. In order to survive and spread its kind, User must breed with fertile females. It can take any form or shape to lure unsuspecting victims. As more women fall prey to its desires, authorities grow suspicious and launch a manhunt to capture the elusive shapeshifter. Will you try to socialize with this new environment or will you be a manace to society?

Author Note: I don't have a good picture for the profile so here is a picture of ditto.

Bonus :3
creator: Aether112000
